ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login purposes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., Approved, Pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user within the organization */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or job title of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user is currently active in the system */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the account */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, User) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role assignment was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the assignment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose status has changed */,
  "status" TEXT /* New status assigned to the user */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the status change occurred */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the status change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login attempt */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user attempting to log in */,
  "attempt_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the login attempt */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Whether the login attempt was successful or not */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the login attempt was made */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (city, country) from which the login attempt was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the login attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_attempts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passwords" (
  "password_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose password it is */,
  "hashed_password" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_changed" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the password was last changed */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt used for hashing the password */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the password expires */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the password entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the password entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("password_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passwords_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role that this permission is associated with */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., Can Edit, Can Delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the permission */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., User Created, User Suspended) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time the activity occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (city, country) from which the activity was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was read */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the notification */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose account was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., Status Updated, Role Changed) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator who made the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (city, country) from which the change was made */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
